=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:45-5:78) TS377026: Consider using Effect Schema for JSON operations instead of JSON.parse/JSON.stringify. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D2] (8:31-8:41) TS377022: The 'catch' callback in Effect.try returns global 'Error', which loses type safety as untagged errors merge together. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D4] (10:16-10:44) TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file"
